channel.title: Documentation on Ted Regis Site
channel.description: Recent content in Documentation on Ted Regis Site

item.title: Security Tags Guide - Understanding Vulnerability Categories
item.description: Security Vulnerability Tags Reference This document provides a comprehensive overview of all available security tags in this blog, explaining what each vulnerability type represents and how the tagging system works. How the Tagging System Works Frontend Implementation Tags are rendered using CSS classes defined in /assets/css/custom.css. Each tag has: A base class .tag-pin with default styling A specific class .tag-[tagname] for custom colors Automatic page generation by Hugo .tag-pin { display: inline-block; padding: 0.
